sources.expression:
$this->wpdb->get_results(
			$this->wpdb->prepare( //phpcs:ignore
				'SELECT * FROM ' . esc_sql( $this->wpdb->options ) . ' WHERE option_name LIKE %s ORDER BY option_name DESC',
				'sgo_speed_test_%'
			),
			ARRAY_A
		)

$this->wpdb->get_col(
			$this->wpdb->prepare( //phpcs:ignore
				'SELECT option_name FROM ' . esc_sql( $this->wpdb->options ) . ' WHERE option_name LIKE %s AND option_value < %d',
				$this->wpdb->esc_like( '_transient_timeout' ) . '%', //phpcs:ignore
				$time//phpcs:ignore
			)//phpcs:ignore
		)
$this->wpdb->get_results( "SELECT table_name, data_free FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = '" . DB_NAME . "' and Engine <> 'InnoDB' and data_free > 0" )

$this->wpdb->get_results(
			$this->wpdb->prepare( //phpcs:ignore
				"
				SELECT REPLACE( option_name, 'siteground_optimizer_', '' ) AS name, option_value AS value
				FROM " . esc_sql( $this->wpdb->options ) . '
				WHERE option_name LIKE %s
				',
				'%siteground_optimizer_%'
			)
		)

$this->wpdb->get_results(
				$this->wpdb->prepare( //phpcs:ignore
					"
					SELECT REPLACE( meta_key, 'siteground_optimizer_', '' ) AS name, meta_value AS value
					FROM " . esc_sql( $this->wpdb->sitemeta ) . ' 
					WHERE meta_key LIKE %s
					',
					'%siteground_optimizer_%'
				)
			)

$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( "
			SELECT *
			FROM {$table}
			WHERE {$column} LIKE %s
			ORDER BY {$key_column} ASC
			LIMIT 1
		", $key ) )

sinks.expression:
printf( '

%2$s

', esc_attr( $class ), esc_html( $message ), esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-ajax.php?action=dismiss_memcache_notice' ) ) )

$this->wpdb->get_results(
			$this->wpdb->prepare( //phpcs:ignore
				'SELECT * FROM ' . esc_sql( $this->wpdb->options ) . ' WHERE option_name LIKE %s ORDER BY option_name DESC',
				'sgo_speed_test_%'
			),
			ARRAY_A
		)
preg_replace( '~<\/title>~', '</title><link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com/" crossorigin/><link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"/>', $html, 1 )

$this->wpdb->get_col(
			$this->wpdb->prepare( //phpcs:ignore
				'SELECT option_name FROM ' . esc_sql( $this->wpdb->options ) . ' WHERE option_name LIKE %s AND option_value < %d',
				$this->wpdb->esc_like( '_transient_timeout' ) . '%', //phpcs:ignore
				$time//phpcs:ignore
			)//phpcs:ignore
		)
$this->wpdb->get_results( "SELECT table_name, data_free FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = '" . DB_NAME . "' and Engine <> 'InnoDB' and data_free > 0" )

exec(
			sprintf(
				$placeholder, // The command.
				$this->compression_level_map[ $type ][ $level ], // The compression level.
				$filepath, // Image path.
				$output_filepath // New Image path.

			),
			$output,
			$status
		)

exec(
			sprintf(
				$placeholder, // The command.
				$quality, // The quality %.
				$quality_type, // The quality type -lossless or -lossy.
				$filepath // Image path.
			),
			$output,
			$status
		)

printf( '

%2$s

', esc_attr( 'notice notice-error sg-optimizer-notice' ), wp_kses_post( $message ), esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-ajax.php?action=dismiss_blocking_plugins_notice' ) ) )

printf( '

%2$s

', esc_attr( 'notice notice-error sg-optimizer-notice' ), wp_kses_post( $message ), esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-ajax.php?action=dismiss_cache_plugins_notice' ) ) )

$this->wpdb->get_results(
			$this->wpdb->prepare( //phpcs:ignore
				"
				SELECT REPLACE( option_name, 'siteground_optimizer_', '' ) AS name, option_value AS value
				FROM " . esc_sql( $this->wpdb->options ) . '
				WHERE option_name LIKE %s
				',
				'%siteground_optimizer_%'
			)
		)

$this->wpdb->get_results(
				$this->wpdb->prepare( //phpcs:ignore
					"
					SELECT REPLACE( meta_key, 'siteground_optimizer_', '' ) AS name, meta_value AS value
					FROM " . esc_sql( $this->wpdb->sitemeta ) . ' 
					WHERE meta_key LIKE %s
					',
					'%siteground_optimizer_%'
				)
			)

$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( "
			SELECT *
			FROM {$table}
			WHERE {$column} LIKE %s
			ORDER BY {$key_column} ASC
			LIMIT 1
		", $key ) )
fwrite(STDERR, 'Composer detected issues in your platform:' . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL . implode(PHP_EOL, $issues) . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL)

wp_remote_post(
				self::API_URL . '/collect_plugin_data',
				array(
					'timeout' => 10,
					'headers' => array(
						'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
						'X-auth-token' => $this->get_auth_token(),
					),
					'sslverify' => false,
					'body'      => json_encode(
						array( 'data' => $data )
					),
				)
			)

sanitizers.expression:
$this->wpdb->prepare( //phpcs:ignore
				'SELECT * FROM ' . esc_sql( $this->wpdb->options ) . ' WHERE option_name LIKE %s ORDER BY option_name DESC',
				'sgo_speed_test_%'
			)

$this->wpdb->prepare( //phpcs:ignore
				'SELECT option_name FROM ' . esc_sql( $this->wpdb->options ) . ' WHERE option_name LIKE %s AND option_value < %d',
				$this->wpdb->esc_like( '_transient_timeout' ) . '%', //phpcs:ignore
				$time//phpcs:ignore
			)

$this->wpdb->prepare(
			'
			    DELETE FROM ' . esc_sql( $this->wpdb->postmeta ) . '
			    WHERE `meta_key` = %s
			    OR `meta_key` = %s
			    OR `meta_key` = %s
			    OR `meta_key` = %s
			    ',
			esc_sql( $this->batch_skipped ),
			esc_sql( $this->process_map['attempts'] ),
			esc_sql( $this->process_map['failed'] ),
			'siteground_optimizer_original_filesize'
		)

$this->wpdb->prepare( //phpcs:ignore
				"
				SELECT REPLACE( option_name, 'siteground_optimizer_', '' ) AS name, option_value AS value
				FROM " . esc_sql( $this->wpdb->options ) . '
				WHERE option_name LIKE %s
				',
				'%siteground_optimizer_%'
			)

$this->wpdb->prepare( //phpcs:ignore
					"
					SELECT REPLACE( meta_key, 'siteground_optimizer_', '' ) AS name, meta_value AS value
					FROM " . esc_sql( $this->wpdb->sitemeta ) . ' 
					WHERE meta_key LIKE %s
					',
					'%siteground_optimizer_%'
				)

$wpdb->prepare( "
			SELECT *
			FROM {$table}
			WHERE {$column} LIKE %s
			ORDER BY {$key_column} ASC
			LIMIT 1
		", $key )
